summary: Comprehensive testing of 9xCodes Newsletter and Bulk Article Management features. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

backend.newsletter_subscribe_invalid: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid email format

frontend.homepage_newsletter_cta: PASS - Newsletter CTA section with email input and subscribe button visible
frontend.homepage_newsletter_subscribe: PASS - Subscription works, shows 'Subscribed successfully!' message
frontend.footer_newsletter_form: PASS - Footer newsletter form with email input and subscribe button
frontend.admin_panel_subscribers_card: PASS - Subscribers card visible with Users icon
frontend.admin_panel_articles_card: PASS - Articles card visible with Layers icon
frontend.subscribers_manager_search: PASS - Search filter filters subscribers by email
frontend.subscribers_manager_delete: PASS - Delete (trash) buttons present for each subscriber
frontend.articles_manager_export_csv_json: PASS - Export CSV and JSON buttons present
frontend.articles_manager_select_checkbox: PASS - Checkboxes to select articles work
frontend.articles_manager_bulk_actions: PASS - Bulk actions bar appears with 'Delete' and 'Move' options

seed_data_creation: Test subscribers created with unique UUID prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter and Bulk Article Management features fully tested. Newsletter APIs at /api/newsletter/subscribe, /subscribers, /subscribers/export, /subscribers/{email}, /subscribers/count. Articles bulk APIs at /api/articles/list, /bulk-delete, /bulk-category, /export. Frontend pages: /admin/subscribers (SubscribersManager), /admin/articles (ManageArticles). Both homepage and footer have newsletter subscription forms. Admin panel has quick access cards for Subscribers and Articles.
